idea-plugin.name: Endpoint Lens
idea-plugin.description: Endpoint Lens helps you understand Spring HTTP mappings in large projects. It indexes controller endpoints, provides fast search/navigation, and warns about duplicate mappings before they cause runtime confusion.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.1

  • Improved generic type resolution — dynamically unwraps unknown wrapper types (Callable, CompletableFuture, etc.) without a hardcoded list.
  • Fixed generic record parsing (e.g. PageResponseDto<T>) that previously produced empty JSON.
  • Enum fields now render as "ENUM" instead of empty objects.
  • Date/time types (OffsetDateTime, ZonedDateTime, etc.) now display their type name instead of empty objects.
  • @Schema example values are used in JSON preview when available.

1.1.0

  • Added Response JSON Structure preview panel — instantly see the response shape of any selected endpoint.
  • Improved search UX: dedicated search field with magnifier icon and one-click clear button.
  • Enhanced search highlight with high-visibility yellow markers for matched tokens.
  • Redesigned filter layout — Method and Module filters on the first row, Controller on the second row, all column-aligned.
  • Popup now closes automatically when navigating to an endpoint via Enter or double-click.
  • Location display in search results now shows only filename and line number for cleaner readability.
  • Endpoint count status label added below filters showing how many results are visible.
  • Updated tool window icon to match the plugin's visual identity.

1.0.0

  • Initial release of Endpoint Lens.
  • Project-wide indexing of Spring HTTP endpoints.
  • Searchable endpoint navigation via tool window and popup action.
  • Duplicate endpoint inspection with IDE warnings.
